% !TEX program = xelatex
% Aesthetic Computer — Collected Papers & Grants (Reader)
% Auto-generated reader that merges all papers and grant applications
% into a single printable PDF with global page numbering.

\documentclass[12pt,letterpaper]{article}

% === PACKAGES ===
\usepackage[top=1in, bottom=1in, left=1in, right=1in]{geometry}
\usepackage{fontspec}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{pdfpages}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\usepackage{eso-pic}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usepackage{ragged2e}

% === FONTS ===
\setmainfont{Latin Modern Sans}
\newfontfamily\acbold{ywft-processing-bold}[
  Path=../system/public/type/webfonts/,
  Extension=.ttf
]

% === COLORS ===
\definecolor{acpink}{RGB}{180,72,135}
\definecolor{acpurple}{RGB}{120,80,180}
\definecolor{acgray}{RGB}{119,119,119}

% === HYPERREF ===
\hypersetup{
  colorlinks=true,
  linkcolor=acpurple,
  urlcolor=acpurple,
  pdftitle={Aesthetic Computer — Collected Papers & Grants (Reader Draft)},
  pdfauthor={Jeffrey Alan Scudder},
}

% === PARAGRAPH ===
\setlength{\parindent}{0em}
\setlength{\parskip}{0.5em}
\RaggedRight

% === HEADER/FOOTER ===
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
\fancyhead[L]{\small\color{acgray}\textit{Aesthetic Computer Reader --- Draft \today}}
\fancyhead[R]{\small\color{acgray}\textit{\thepage}}
\fancyfoot{}

% === INCLUDED-PDF FOOTER OVERLAY ===
% This style overlays global page numbers on included PDFs
\fancypagestyle{included}{%
  \fancyhf{}%
  \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}%
  \fancyhead[L]{\small\color{acgray}\textit{Aesthetic Computer Reader --- Draft \today}}%
  \fancyhead[R]{\small\color{acgray}\textit{\thepage}}%
}

% === HELPER: include a paper with a TOC entry ===
\newcommand{\readerpart}[2]{%
  % #1 = TOC title, #2 = PDF path
  \cleardoublepage
  \phantomsection
  \addcontentsline{toc}{section}{#1}%
  \includepdf[pages=-, pagecommand={\thispagestyle{included}}]{#2}%
}

% ===================================================================
\begin{document}

% === TITLE PAGE ===
\thispagestyle{empty}
\begin{center}

{\large\color{acgray} Reader Draft}

\vspace{2cm}
{\color{acgray}

  Los Angeles, CA\\[12pt]
  \href{https://aesthetic.computer}{aesthetic.computer}
}

\vspace{3cm}
{\color{acgray}\small
  Generated \today\\[4pt]
  26 papers + 1 grant application\\[4pt]
  \textit{This reader is a working draft for review and printing.}
}

\vfill
{\color{acpink}\rule{0.4\textwidth}{1.5pt}}
\end{center}

\newpage

\thispagestyle{fancy}
\phantomsection

\end{center}

\readerpart{KidLisp Cards: Programs That Fit on a Card}{arxiv-kidlisp-cards/kidlisp-cards.pdf}

% --- Education & Sustainability ---

% --- Meta & Future ---
